compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for preconditions-baseline-collect.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Write failing tests for the preconditions-baseline-collect.sh restart-rate baseline collector.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: script writes a PRECONDITIONS event with gate_name=restart_rate_baseline for a given epic and session
- [ ] Test: restart_count captured from ticket REPLAN_TRIGGER comment history is included in the event data field
- [ ] Test: second invocation for the same (epic_id, session_id) produces a new LWW entry (does not fail; latest wins at read time)
- [ ] File: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-baseline.sh (must NOT yet exist; tests must fail RED)
- [ ] .test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-baseline-collect.sh -> tests/scripts/test-preconditions-baseline.sh

## Files to Modify
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-baseline.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (add mapping)

## Testing Mode
RED — tests must fail before T6 implements the script
